sourcesContent:
import { CatButtonsProps, DudeButtonsProps } from "./button-interfaces";
import { Button } from "@mui/material";
import Typography from '@mui/material/Typography';

export const CatButtons = ({ handleClickHair, handleClickEyes }: CatButtonsProps) => (
    <>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Fur
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickHair}>Change Fur Color</Button>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Eyes
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickEyes}>Change Eye Color</Button>
    </>
  );

export const DudeButtons = ({
    handleClickHair,
    handleClickBeard,
    handleClickGlasses,
    handleClickShirt,
  }: DudeButtonsProps) => (
    <>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Hair
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickHair}>Change Hair Color</Button>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Beard
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickBeard}>Change Beard Color</Button>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Glasses
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickGlasses}>Change Glasses Color</Button>
      <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
        Shirt
      </Typography>
      <Button onClick={handleClickShirt}>Change Shirt Color</Button>
    </>
  );
  
  export default DudeButtons;
